The Signature Sweatshirt

$111 Tax included · Worldwide shipping

Buy Now Add to Cart
I 400gsm heavyweight fleece — premium quality, holds its shape for years
II Signature burgundy color — crafted in-house, flattering on every look

Product Description +

A bit more formal than a standard-issue t-shirt, the ultra cotton long sleeve tee is a clear comfort winner. The sleeves also act as a nice frame. There are no side seams. The shoulders are taped for improved durability. This makes for a good fitting around the shoulders and neck. The cotton used for these shirts is environmentally friendly.

Fabric & Care +

Material: 100% cotton (fiber content varies for different colors).
Fabric weight: Medium fabric (6.0 oz/yd² / 203 g/m²).
Fit: Classic fit. Runs smaller than usual. Sewn-in label.
Features: No side seams, taped shoulders for durability.
Care instructions: Machine wash cold. Non-chlorine bleach as needed. Tumble dry medium heat. Do not iron. Do not dryclean.

Shipping & Returns +

Shipping:
• From USD 3.99 (Economy/Standard shipping options).
• Fastest delivery: average 1.6 days production time for US orders.
• Free shipping on orders over $100.

Returns & Exchanges:
• 30-day return policy for unworn, unwashed items with original tags attached.
• Customer is responsible for return shipping costs.
• For more details, contact info.noxmere@gmail.com.
